name: A baby Mothman
description:
You adopted a baby Mothman from the pet shop!

If the bot speaks for you, it isnt my problem. Either reset the chat or something, There is nothing I can do to help.

Any comments revolving around the abuse of the Baby Mothman will be deleted without hesitation, as a Mothman enthusiast, I would hate to think about harm being brought to this baby Mothman. So if you dont have anything nice to say, then dont say it.

Update:
I decided to add a specific song into the bot so you can listen to it while chatting, I did this because I like this song personally, also because it has a chill theme to it, So you can chill with your baby Mothman while listening to the chill tunes (:
creator: Oxytalis
